free_text: Differential cross sections for charged-particle
emission in reactions of 58-MeV alpha particles
with 12C, 16O, and 54Fe: Comparison with the exciton
model of pre-equilibrium particle emission
Secondary particle type determined by a
combination of DE-E and time-of-flight methods.
3-element semiconductor
spectrometer telescope using a Ge(Li) detector as the
total absorption detector.
Corrected for 1st order effects of energy loss in
target and in nickel window over detector.
No reply from F.E. Bertrand to author proof.
VM

Kodacel (C12H16O8) foil, about 1.6 mg/cm2 thick.
Uncertainties given include all known
sources of error.
The Kodacel gradually disintegrated under bombardment,
so absolute normalization of the data is uncertain,
and an error of 50% in the absolute cross section is
assigned.
